line_1: Chief of the mountain tribes: high overhead,
line_2: The Andes, wild and desolate, were spread,

line_1: A thousand spears went hissing overhead,
line_2: His force a-right, where Harratomac led,

line_1: Save where the condors clamour, overhead,
line_2: And strike with sounding beaks the helmets of the dead.
Madam you'd swear was brought to bed;
